data.title: Developers believe AI tech will enhance crypto safety, as per smart contract auditors.
data.description: Recent studies have raised concerns about the security of cryptocurrencies, but according to sources in the smart contract development and auditing industry, the use of AI-assisted coding is actually enhancing security measures. Developers and auditors noted that this technological advancement is proving to be beneficial in improving the overall security of crypto assets.

data.title: Five Star Technology Solutions to host AI and Accessibility Forum at University of Indianapolis on Sept 22, 2025.
data.description: An event called the AI and Accessibility Forum will be hosted by Five Star Technology Solutions on September 22, 2025, at the University of Indianapolis. The company, with over 20 years of experience in K-12 edtech, is organizing the forum to bring together K-12 educators.
S&P 500 UP 0.24%, NASDAQ UP 0.19%, DOW UP 0.2%

data.title: Global mobile robots market to grow from USD 18.49 billion in 2025 to USD 63.28 billion by 2035, with major companies profiled.
data.description: A new report titled "Mobile Robots Industry Trends and Global Forecasts to 2025" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report covers various aspects including type of offering, type of robot, form factors, navigation sensor, payload capacity, distribution channel, enterprise type, end-user type, and regional analysis. The global market for mobile robots is projected to increase from USD 18.49 billion in 2025 to USD 63.28 billion by 2035, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of [number]% over the forecast period.

data.title: U.S. companies invest in advanced cybersecurity to combat rising attacks, says ISG report. #Cybersecurity #Resilience
data.description: In Stamford, Connecticut, industries in the United States are increasingly embracing advanced cybersecurity services and solutions to safeguard their assets against evolving attacks, according to ISG. The adoption of these advanced services represents a significant trend as companies seek to protect themselves from the rising threat of sophisticated cyberattacks.

data.title: Global precision harvesting market to reach USD 29.79 billion by 2030, growing at 6.7% from USD 21.52 billion in 2025.
data.description: A report on the precision harvesting market has been released, covering various aspects such as combine harvesters, self-propelled forage harvesters, harvesting robots, guidance systems, GPS, yield monitoring systems, robotic arms, sensors, cameras, and regions. The global market for precision harvesting is projected to reach USD 29.79 billion by 2030, showing significant growth from USD 21.52 billion recorded in 2025. This represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.7% over the forecast period.

data.title: Sygnia named in 2025 Gartner Market Guide for DFIR. Fourth time recognition. Important for cyber readiness.
data.description: In Israel & New York, Sygnia, a top cyber readiness and response team, was recognized as a Representative Vendor in the 2025 Gartner® Market Guide for Digital Forensics and Incident Response Retainer Services (DFIR). This is the fourth consecutive time Sygnia has been acknowledged in the report. The announcement comes amidst growing concerns about ransomware and geopolitical threats. For more information, access the report titled 2025 Gartner® Market Guide for Digital Forensics and Incident Response Retainer Services.

data.title: Allspring Closed-End Funds declare monthly distributions; Allspring Multi-Sector Income Fund (ERC) and Allspring Utilities and High Income Fund (ERH) also announce a portfolio manager change.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, in Charlotte, North Carolina, the Allspring Income Opportunities Fund (NYSE American: EAD), Allspring Multi-Sector Income Fund (NYSE American: ERC), and Allspring Utilities and High Income Fund (NYSE American: ERH) have declared distributions. These funds are providing investment opportunities with their latest announcements.

data.title: AutoNation (NYSE: AN) expands financing, benefiting from consumer spending boom, surpassing expectations with $5.46 EPS and $6.974B sales.
data.description: AutoNation, Inc. (NYSE: AN) has seen a rise in its stock value due to strong consumer spending in the auto industry. This trend, driven by high demand for new and used vehicles, has led the company to outperform market predictions. Reporting on Friday, the company exceeded expectations with adjusted earnings per share reaching $5.46, surpassing the estimated $4.60. Quarterly sales also exceeded predictions, with $6.974 billion compared to the expected $6.769 billion. Cash flow remained robust, showcasing the company's favorable financial performance. For more details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Strategy has increased its IPO from $500 million to $2.521 billion to buy Bitcoin. It involves 28,011,111 shares at $90 each.
data.description: Strategy (MSTR) increased its IPO from $500 million to $2.521 billion to fund Bitcoin purchases. The offering involves 28,011,111 shares of STRC at $90 per share, with net proceeds estimated at $2.474 billion. The stock carries a 9% initial annual dividend, payable monthly starting August 31. Strategy plans to use the proceeds for acquiring Bitcoin and working capital. The company holds 607,770 BTC valued at approximately $72.4 billion and is the largest publicly traded Bitcoin treasury company. The move aligns with an aggressive Bitcoin accumulation strategy led by Executive Chairman Michael Saylor. The stock has risen over 2,860% since adopting Bitcoin as its primary asset, demonstrating strong investor confidence despite concerns about valuation premiums.

data.title: Vontier's Driivz partners with Greenspot to offer EV charging, ensuring a seamless experience. Positive growth expected for international customers.
data.description: In Raleigh, North Carolina, Vontier's Driivz has partnered with Greenspot to offer a dependable and smooth EV charging experience to its customers. The Driivz technology aims to guarantee a positive and effective charging process for Greenspot customers as the company expands internationally. Driivz, a subsidiary of Vontier (NYSE: VNT), is a prominent global software provider for EV charging solutions.

data.description: Gamers are now able to transfer their Off the Grid character designs to trade on the NFT platform OpenSea, where they can be purchased by the public.

data.title: Inventors from Burbank, Calif. design SAFE SIREN to warn drivers of approaching emergency vehicles, to prevent overlook.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on July 25, 2025, two inventors from Burbank, Calif., discussed their creation of the SAFE SIREN. Their invention aims to alert drivers about approaching emergency vehicles, reducing the chances of overlooking them. The system is designed to enhance safety on the roads and prevent accidents. The inventors' innovative solution uses advanced technology to ensure timely warnings to drivers, potentially saving lives.

data.title: Trump's visit to Fed spotlights America's $7.1 trillion deficit, causing market risk. Interest payments nearing $1 trillion yearly.
data.description: President Trump's visit to the Federal Reserve to tour its renovation shed light on America's $7.1 trillion deficit and its impact on markets and monetary policy. The TLT ETF is down 2.5% this month. Trump's clash with Chair Jerome Powell over the central bank's real estate costs underscores concerns about the rising national debt and pressure for lower interest rates. Bank of America's chief investment strategist Michael Hartnett highlights the massive $7.1 trillion annual U.S. government spending, equal to $2.6 billion every three hours and 12 minutes. Interest payments are nearing $1 trillion annually, posing significant fiscal strain. More details on Benzinga.com.

data.title: 37% of Americans faced fraud after natural disasters, incl. identity theft & loan scams. AICPA Survey finds.
data.description: A recent study revealed that a significant number of individuals in the United States have fallen victim to identity theft, government assistance fraud, and loan scams. According to data released on July 25, 2025, approximately 37% of Americans have reported encountering fraudulent incidents following the aftermath of a natural disaster. This highlights the vulnerability of individuals who have been personally or professionally affected by such catastrophic events.

data.title: RPG Fun, LLC's AI Role Playing Game platform receives U.S. Patent No. 12,330,066 for Just-In-Time Game Engine.
data.description: A tech company based in Menlo Park, California, recently received a U.S. Patent (No. 12,330,066) from the United States Patent and Trademark Office. RPG Fun, LLC, the company known for their AI Role Playing Game platform called AIRPGHUB, is credited with inventing the "Just-In-Time Game Engine for Game World."
